case_title: D. GARRISON ROOFING & CONSTRUCTION, INC. VS. WILLIAM BROWN et al

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF D. GARRISON ROOFING & CONSTRUCTION, INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BROWN, WILLIAM DEFENDANT WILLIAM BROWN WAIVES SERVICE. ACTION DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT JEANNETTE PRESTON. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,750.00 FILED BY D. GARRISON ROOFING & CONSTRUCTION, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, WILLIAM PRESTON, JEANETTE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-20-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT BROWN, WILLIAM ADDITIONAL PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF FILED BY D. GARRISON ROOFING & CONSTRUCTION, INC. BROWN, WILLIAM

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-20-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-20-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-20-2009 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF D. GARRISON ROOFING & CONSTRUCTION, INC.
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO JEANETTE PRESTON BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF MAY-20-2009 AT 1:30PM.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-03-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
